title: Job Opening Teacher at Career Launcher

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Teacher at Career Launcher
jsonLd.description:
Join the Career Launcher family as a Teacher in Gurgaon. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Career Launcher:
Career Launcher is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Support students with special educational needs
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Career Launcher!
